Body.Content:
In response to feedback from you, our customers, we are adding support for even more formatting options when composing in Outlook for iOS or Android! You will be able to choose font size, set a default font, as well as clearing and painting formatting.

GA date: June CY2025

message.Title: Outlook: Additional formatting options in Outlook for iOS and Android
